summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: perfect number n=28 = 1+2+4+7+14. 4×7 grid of 1..28 with n=28 marked RED. ValueTracker d_tr walks through proper divisors {1, 2, 4, 7, 14} with always_redraw GREEN cell highlights + running-sum equation rebuilt each frame. Live divisor index + running sum converging to 28. Euclid-Euler table in corner.
